SEARCH
Package com.github.dreamteam.controllers

Class ProjectController

java.lang.Object
com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/projects") public class ProjectController extends Object
ProjectController is responsible for handling HTTP requests related to projects. It provides endpoints for retrieving project information, managing students, and interacting with the ML component.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • ProjectController

      public ProjectController()

  • Method Details

    • getProjects

      @GetMapping public Collection<org.bson.Document> getProjects(@RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> status, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<Integer> limit)
      Retrieves a collection of projects based on the provided status and limit parameters.
      Parameters:
      status - Optional status filter for projects.
      limit - Optional limit on the number of projects to retrieve.
      Returns:
      A collection of projects matching the criteria.

    • getStudents

      @GetMapping("/{projectId}/students") public Collection<org.bson.Document> getStudents(@PathVariable Long projectId)
      Retrieves a collection of students associated with a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - The ID of the project for which to retrieve students.
      Returns:
      A collection of students associated with the specified project.

    • predict

      @PostMapping("/predict") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView predict(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> modelType, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> modelName, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> data, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<Boolean> cleaning, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> saveFile)
      Redirects to the ML component for making predictions based on the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      request - The HTTP request object.
      modelType - Optional parameter for specifying the model type.
      modelName - Optional parameter for specifying the model name.
      data - Optional parameter for specifying the data to be used for predictions.
      cleaning - Optional parameter for specifying whether to clean the data.
      saveFile - Optional parameter for specifying a save file.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object redirecting to the ML component for predictions.

    • getScores

      @GetMapping("/{projectId}/scores") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView getScores(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, @PathVariable Long projectId, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> applicantsFile, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> scoreFile, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> motivationFile)
      Retrieves a collection of scores associated with a specific project.
      Parameters:
      request - The HTTP request object.
      projectId - The ID of the project for which to retrieve scores.
      applicantsFile - Optional parameter for specifying an applicants file.
      scoreFile - Optional parameter for specifying a score file.
      motivationFile - Optional parameter for specifying a motivation file.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object redirecting to the scores page.

    • getAllScores

      @GetMapping("/scores") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView getAllScores(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> applicantsFile, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> scoreFile, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> motivationFile)
      Redirects to the ML component for retrieving all scores.
      Parameters:
      request - The HTTP request object.
      applicantsFile - Optional parameter for specifying an applicants file.
      scoreFile - Optional parameter for specifying a score file.
      motivationFile - Optional parameter for specifying a motivation file.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object redirecting to the scores page.

    • buildTeam

      @PostMapping("{projectId}/team") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView buildTeam(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, @PathVariable Long projectId, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<Integer> size, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> dataFile, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> saveFile)
      Builds a team for a specific project using the ML component.
      Parameters:
      request - The HTTP request object.
      projectId - The ID of the project for which to build a team.
      size - Optional parameter for specifying the size of the team.
      dataFile - Optional parameter for specifying a data file.
      saveFile - Optional parameter for specifying a save file.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object redirecting to the build team page.

    • buildDreamTeam

      @PostMapping("/{projectId}/dream-team") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView buildDreamTeam(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, @PathVariable Long projectId, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<Integer> size, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> applicants, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> scores, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> motivations, @RequestParam(required=false) Optional<String> saveFile)
      Builds a dream team for a specific project using the ML component.
      Parameters:
      request - The HTTP request object.
      projectId - The ID of the project for which to build a dream team.
      size - Optional parameter for specifying the size of the dream team.
      applicants - Optional parameter for specifying the applicants.
      scores - Optional parameter for specifying the scores.
      motivations - Optional parameter for specifying the motivations.
      saveFile - Optional parameter for specifying a save file.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object redirecting to the build dream team page.

    • handleNotFoundExceptions

      @ExceptionHandler(EntityNotFoundException.class) @ResponseStatus(value=NOT_FOUND, reason="MongoDB didn\'t find any document.") public final void handleNotFoundExceptions(EntityNotFoundException e)
      Handles EntityNotFoundException and returns a 404 Not Found response.
      Parameters:
      e - The EntityNotFoundException to handle.

    • handleAllExceptions

      @ExceptionHandler(java.lang.RuntimeException.class) @ResponseStatus(value=INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, reason="Internal Server Error") public final void handleAllExceptions(RuntimeException e)
      Handles RuntimeException and returns a 500 Internal Server Error response.
      Parameters:
      e - The RuntimeException to handle.
